summary: Verified two P0 frontend bug fixes: 1) KG & QNTL fields lock correctly in edit mode, 2) ESC key handlers implemented for photo zoom overlays. Both features working as expected.

new_entry_mode.kg_enabled: PASS - KG input is ENABLED when creating new entry
new_entry_mode.qntl_enabled: PASS - QNTL input is ENABLED when creating new entry
new_entry_mode.no_locked_label: PASS - Labels do NOT show '(Locked)' text

edit_mode.kg_disabled: PASS - KG input is DISABLED when editing existing entry
edit_mode.qntl_disabled: PASS - QNTL input is DISABLED when editing existing entry

feature_2_esc_key_photo_zoom.code_review: PASS - All components have correct ESC key handlers

vehicle_weight_jsx.line_1387: onEscapeKeyDown handler checks for photo-zoom-overlay, camera-zoom-overlay
vehicle_weight_jsx.line_451_456: useEffect ESC handler for zoomImg state with stopImmediatePropagation

auto_weight_entries_jsx.line_381: onEscapeKeyDown handler checks for awe-photo-zoom-overlay, photo-zoom-overlay, camera-zoom-overlay
auto_weight_entries_jsx.line_44_50: useEffect ESC handler for zoomImg state with stopImmediatePropagation

view_entry_dialog_jsx.line_38: Checks for awe-photo-zoom-overlay in addition to photo-zoom-overlay and camera-zoom-overlay

ui_verification.edit_entry_dialog: PASS - Opens with KG/QNTL disabled and (Locked) labels

critical_code_review_comments: KG/QNTL lock implementation is correct: disabled={rstFetched || !!editingId} on lines 273, 283
Label shows '(Locked)' text conditionally: {(rstFetched || editingId) ? ' (Locked)' : ''} on lines 264, 277
ESC key handlers use stopImmediatePropagation() to prevent parent dialog from closing
All photo zoom overlays have data-testid attributes for detection: photo-zoom-overlay, camera-zoom-overlay, awe-photo-zoom-overlay
seed_data_creation: Created test entry RST 77777, Truck TESTKG01, KG 1000 for edit mode testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both P0 bugs verified fixed: 1) KG/QNTL fields are locked (disabled) in edit mode with '(Locked)' label text, 2) ESC key handlers prevent parent dialog from closing when photo zoom overlay is open. Test entry RST 77777 exists in FY 2026-2027.

vehicle_weight.dialog_handler: Line 1387: onEscapeKeyDown checks for zoom overlays
vehicle_weight.zoom_handler: Lines 451-456: useEffect ESC handler for zoomImg

auto_weight_entries.dialog_handler: Line 381: onEscapeKeyDown checks for zoom overlays
auto_weight_entries.zoom_handler: Lines 44-50: useEffect ESC handler for zoomImg
